title: jacea zlatarskyana
intro: Jacea zlatarskyana, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and broad leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids compounds. The health benefits of Jacea zlatarskyana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
